failure_reason: Added a native substrate ledger shape for model executor proof runs. docs/coherence-substrate/model-executor-proof-ledger.form defines the proof-run contract; docs/system_audit/model_executor_run_ledger stores per-run native records; scripts/model_executor_proof_ledger.py validates those records and exports canonical JSONL for legacy readers. The existing docs/system_audit/model_executor_runs.jsonl remains a compatibility cache while future proof writers can avoid append-only merge contention by writing per-run native records first. Focused validation passed; api/.venv/bin/pytest was unavailable in this worktree, so tests ran with python3 -m pytest.
